name: Your Full Name
tagline: A normal person who loves coding, leaving in solace, and hoping to buy that Norwegian  cow one day in my vast farm

gp.title: School Sense - A smart peer-to-peer learning platform

quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity
message: Don't lose your hope ever, always hang with Allah, and surround yourself with good people who will support you and help you to achieve your goals. And remember that you are the one who can change your life, so work hard and never give up
fun_fact: I love Hawashi sooooooooo much that if you make me choose between it and a million dollars, I will choose the million dollars (3ady)
